cold_start_findings.main_bottleneck: external video model queue and generation

observed_timing.note: Voice generation ran in parallel with Kling. Human visual review and the one-time FFmpeg compatibility debugging are excluded from the clean-repeat estimate.

repeatability_improvements_from_this_run: Reference analysis reuses matching SHA-256 results.
Dry-run is read-only and reports paid seconds, retries, resolution, and reused assets.
Execution requires an explicit cost-authorization flag.
Product facts, prohibited phrases, duration, strategies, and asset IDs are compiler-validated.
Captions fall back to transparent PNG overlays when FFmpeg has no libass filter.
Deliverable AAC output is explicitly locked to 48 kHz.
Large audio and video binaries remain local and are excluded from Git.
